---
title: "Open Scholarship Bootcamp 2026"
subtitle: "Welcome • Day 1"
format: 
  revealjs:
    logo: https://brand.psu.edu/images/backgrounds/penn-state-shield.jpg
    theme:
      - serif
      - include/css/psu.scss
    mainfont: roboto

knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    fig.path: include/fig/ 
---

## Welcome! Please check in

```{r}
#| label: checkin-qr-code
#| echo: false
#| fig-align: "center"

plot(qrcode::qr_code("https://pennstate.qualtrics.com/jfe/form/SV_5vdpIekRnWpfsBo"))
```

## Introductions

- Directors
- [Program committee](program-committee.qmd)

## Logistics

- Food
- Bathrooms
- Space

## Schedule

- [Day 1](day-1.qmd)
- [Day 2](day-2.qmd)

## Why are *you* here?

::: {.fragment}
![](https://scootsa1000momofthree.files.wordpress.com/2016/01/tumblr_mb50g9iouj1rhwredo1_500.gif){fig-align="center" width="60%"}
:::

## Why are *we* here?

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width=50%}
::: {.incremental}
- Open is cool
- Open is fun
- Open is the future

:::
:::
::: {.column width=50%}
![](include/img/osi-logo.jpg){width="80%" fig-align="right"}
:::
::::

## Thank you, sponsors!

:::::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
![](include/img/csc-logo.png){fig-align="center"}
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![](include/img/libraries.png){fig-align="center"}
:::
::::::

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width=50%}
![](include/img/icds.png){fig-align="center"}
:::
::: {.column width=50%}
![](include/img/ssri-logo.png){fig-align="center"}
:::
::::

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width=50%}
![](include/img/psychology.png){fig-align="center"}
:::
::: {.column width=50%}
![](include/img/statistics-dept.png){fig-align="center"}
:::
::::
